lineageNote: This version is migrated from OfficeCLI into a Node.js + Bun-native workspace.

families.label: Preview / watch / HTML rendering
requiredBehaviors: Live watch page with event-stream-driven refresh
Bootstrap state when no rendered update has been pushed yet
Preview metadata contract that later CLI handlers can populate

families.label: Skill catalog / skill install flow
requiredBehaviors: Base officekit skill text keeps agent-first onboarding
Known agent targets map to home-directory skill folders
Skill catalog retains specialized guide names for later porting
Installed skill text uses officekit branding plus explicit OfficeCLI lineage

families.label: Install / update / config surface
requiredBehaviors: Release manifest captures per-platform asset naming
PATH/profile guidance remains automated where safe
Skill-install hints remain part of onboarding
Config/update surfaces are tracked for later CLI wiring

families.label: Docs / help / README lineage
requiredBehaviors: Root README explicitly says this version is migrated from OfficeCLI
Audience lanes stay explicit for AI agents, developers, and maintainers
Help topics remain organized by format + verb + optional element/property
Migration docs distinguish scaffolded vs implemented vs verified capabilities
